CREATE TABLE test_variant (v Variant(UInt64, String, Array(UInt64))) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT v, variantElement(v, 'String') AS extracted_string, variantElement(v, 'UInt64') AS extracted_uint64, variantElement(v, 'Array(UInt64)') AS extracted_array FROM test_variant;
CREATE TABLE test_default (v Variant(UInt64, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT variantElement(v, 'String', 'Default String') AS string_result FROM test_default;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id UInt32, v Variant(UInt64, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_nested VALUES (1, NULL), (2, (uint64) 55), (3, 'Test Nested');
SELECT id, variantElement(v, 'UInt64') AS extracted_uint64 FROM test_nested WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_nested WHERE variantElement(v, 'String') IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, v Variant(UInt64, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a.id, variantElement(a.v, 'UInt64') AS extracted_uint64, b.v AS string_value FROM test_join a JOIN test_join b ON a.id = b.id WHERE variantElement(b.v, 'String') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id UInt32, v1 Variant(UInt64, String), v2 Variant(Array(UInt64)) ) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, variantElement(v1, 'UInt64') AS uint64_result, variantElement(v2, 'Array(UInt64)') AS array_result FROM test_complex WHERE variantElement(v1, 'String', 'Default') = 'Default';
